title: Oita,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Oita, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Oita is a city in with a population of 475,000. Known as the hot spring capital of Japan, with the highest concentration of onsen in the country and a relaxed lifestyle.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
